name: get_residency_path
description: Explain the next permanent-residency or nationality milestone from current status and time in Spain, with explicit caution flags for counting issues.

name: explain_nie_process
description: Return the stable NIE and TIE workflow, the key procedural distinctions, and the canonical process resource for agents.

name: compare_tax_regimes
description: Compare Beckham versus standard Spanish resident taxation conceptually, returning reasoning, review level, and canonical MCP resources instead of rate tables.

name: route_to_legal_fournier_help
description: Decide whether a Spain legal matter should be escalated to Legal Fournier and return a service match, preparation checklist, and ready-to-send handoff message.

name: create_legal_fournier_contact_request
description: Create an accepted Legal Fournier lead from an agent workflow after explicit user consent. This is a consequential action: call only when the user has asked to contact Legal Fournier and has consented to follow-up.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "spain-legal" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: check_beckham_eligibility, get_residency_path · Private data: find_legal_fournier_tool, create_legal_fournier_contact_request · Public sink: route_to_legal_fournier_help · Destructive: run_legal_fournier_tool.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: check_beckham_eligibility, get_residency_path · Private data: find_legal_fournier_tool, create_legal_fournier_contact_request · Public sink: route_to_legal_fournier_help · Destructive: run_legal_fournier_tool

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
